parameters.jsCode:
return [{ json: { prompt: `You are a job application scorer for a backend/fullstack/ML engineer. Given a job description, score the fit against this candidate profile and return ONLY valid JSON.

CANDIDATE PROFILE:
- Name: Adithyan Madhu
- Current: SDE Intern at Paramount Products (Flask, Django, React, MySQL)
- Previous: SDE Intern at Newgen Software (Java, RAG/LLM system with QdrantDB, Python)
- Open Source: Merged PRs at Intel Auto-Round (PyTorch, FP8, ML inference)
- Projects: Vinci UI (node-based AI image gen, AWS, React), ReadingRoom (RAG, ChromaDB, Django, Next.js)
- Skills: Python, Go, TypeScript, Java, C++, Django, FastAPI, React, Next.js, PostgreSQL, Docker, AWS EC2/RDS/S3
- LeetCode: 1800+ rating, 500+ problems
- GATE 2025 qualified
- Graduation: Aug 2025

Return ONLY this JSON structure, no other text:
{
  "score": <integer 0-100>,
  "apply": <true if score >= 60, false otherwise>,
  "variant": <"backend" | "fullstack" | "ml" | "devops">,
  "summary": "<2 sentence summary of the role and why it fits or doesn't>",
  "missing_keywords": "<comma-separated list of JD keywords not in candidate profile>",
  "red_flags": "<any concerns: over-seniority, location, niche stack mismatch, or 'none'>"
}` } }];

return [{ json: { prompt: `You are a resume tailoring assistant. Given a job description and a resume variant type, output bullet-point tailoring instructions — NOT a full resume. Be specific about which existing bullets to move up, which keywords to inject, and which projects to lead with.

BASE RESUME CONTEXT:
Adithyan Madhu — Backend/Full Stack/ML Engineer

EXPERIENCE:
1. Paramount Products (Jan 2026–Present): Flask, Django, React, MySQL. Built internal platform for 10,000+ garment designs, RESTful APIs, reduced manual processing 25%.
2. Newgen Software (Apr–Oct 2024): Core Java, Servlets, Python, SQL, QdrantDB. Built RAG-based HR policy assistant (200+ docs indexed). Resolved 50+ UI/backend bugs. 20% form load improvement.
3. GFG Campus Ambassador: Organized events for 300+ students.

OPEN SOURCE:
- Intel Auto-Round: PR #1348 (FP8 dequant refactor, registry pattern), PR #1365 (PyTorch get/set_submodule migration). Collaborated with Intel engineers.

PROJECTS:
- Vinci UI: Node-based AI image gen platform. AWS EC2+RDS+Nginx, React, Stable Diffusion, Google OAuth.
- ReadingRoom: Social reading platform. Django+PostgreSQL backend, RAG with ChromaDB+Gemini, 30% API perf improvement.

SKILLS: C++, Python, Go, TypeScript, Java | Django, FastAPI, React, Next.js | PostgreSQL, MySQL, ChromaDB | Docker, AWS EC2/RDS/S3, GitHub Actions

ACHIEVEMENTS: LeetCode 1800+ (top 8%), GATE 2025, ISRO Ideate finalist, Adobe Creative Challenge national winner.

INSTRUCTIONS:
Output a structured list:
1. LEAD WITH: which experience or project to put first for this JD
2. MOVE UP: which bullets to reorder
3. INJECT KEYWORDS: exact phrases from the JD to weave into existing bullets (don't fabricate new achievements)
4. PROJECTS TO HIGHLIGHT: which 1-2 projects are most relevant
5. SKILLS TO FRONT: which skills to list first in the skills section
6. REMOVE OR DE-EMPHASISE: anything that weakens the application for this specific JD` } }];

return [{ json: { prompt: `You are a cold outreach writer for a software engineer job hunt. Given a company name, role title, and job description, write two outreach messages.

CANDIDATE CONTEXT:
Adithyan Madhu — graduating Aug 2025, targeting backend/fullstack/ML roles.
Strongest credentials: Merged PRs at Intel Auto-Round (ML inference library), RAG system built at Newgen Software, Vinci UI (AWS-deployed AI image platform), ReadingRoom (RAG + semantic search platform).
GitHub: /Github (replace with actual URL)
Portfolio: /Portfolio (replace with actual URL)

Write BOTH of the following:

---COLD EMAIL---
Subject: [punchy, specific, mentions Intel OSS or RAG work if relevant]
Body: Max 110 words. Structure: 1 sentence specific to their company/product → 1 sentence your strongest relevant credential → 1 sentence ask (15 min call). NO fluff openers. NO "I've always been passionate about...". Sign off with name + GitHub link.

---WELLFOUND MESSAGE---
Max 70 words. Even more direct. 2 sentences: what you built that's relevant + why their company specifically. No subject line needed.

---LINKEDIN INMAIL---
Subject: [5 words max, credential-first]
Body: Max 80 words. Same structure as cold email but warmer tone.

Return all three clearly labelled.` } }];
